MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SQUARETRADE, INC., CE CARE PLAN CORP., COMPLETE PRODUCT CARE CORP.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay is taken off calendar for Department 302. The case has been designated complex and has been singly assigned to Department 305.
